title: Diagnose why /start is still silent on local main
acceptanceCriteria: Repo-local evidence shows how the current bot runtime on main chooses Telegram delivery mode and what conditions are required for polling to actually consume updates.
The investigation proves whether the user symptom is caused by code regression, local configuration, launch/orchestration gap, Telegram API state, or another deterministic root cause.
If a repo bug exists, the fix is minimal, bounded, and preserves the explicit delivery-mode model introduced in 0.3.18.
If no repo bug exists, diagnostics, logs, docs, or readiness messaging are improved so the silent-failure state stops being misleading.
Regression coverage or proof artifacts are added for the newly identified root cause.
